author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Star Atlas x Honeyland

Introducing our collaboration with Honeyland  . 

Get ready for an exciting step towards interoperability and building the Star Atlas metaverse—coming December 19! 

Craft one of the 100 Honeyland items in SAGE Labs and receive an exclusive airdrop of:
• 1 Honeyland + Star Atlas NFT (part of the Honeyland Legends collection)
• 1 Gen 1 Egg

Note: The airdrop will be determined by who holds the Star Atlas x Honeyland SFT on December 22

This is what full onchain gaming is all about.

 | Learn more: https://medium.com/@playhoneyland/honeyland-star-atlas-collaboration-details-6a8e9d96a148
